title: Large Vanilla Candle - Candle Gift for Women & Men with Lid - (280g/60hr) Long Burn Time with Vanilla, Cream & Caramel - Organic & Vegan Scented - Calming & Sweet
features: LUXURIOUS STRONG SCENT – Elevate your space with the opulent fragrance of Vanilla. Infused with rich vanilla, velvety cream, & indulgent caramel, this exquisite blend fills your home with a warm and decadent aroma. Let the sweet, creamy notes & deep, caramelised undertones create a cosy & inviting ambience, establishing a luxurious long-lasting home fragrance perfect for any living space.

LONG-LASTING AROMA - Enjoy up to 60 hours of indulgent fragrance, bringing you maximum relaxation for longer. Our premium Soy Candles are crafted to deliver a consistent, long-lasting scent that burns evenly to enhance your relaxation & tranquility. Perfect for aromatherapy & those seeking Anxiety/ Stress Relief.

PERFECT LUXURY GIFT - Each candle comes elegantly packaged in a beaufiful signature box with gold detailing, making it a thoughtful gift for special occasions, such as Birthdays, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Anniversaries, Weddings or Christmas. A perfect candle gift for women & loved ones. Or why not as a new home candle gift for house warmings?

100% NATURAL - Our Organic Candles are infused with 100% natural ingredients, including soy wax, essential oils, & feature a lead free cotton wick. Ensuring a clean, eco-friendly burn that's free from harmful chemicals.

BEAUTIFUL HOME DECOR - Our candle suits any style or space, adding a touch of luxury to your home. Whether you're looking for Autumn or Winter Candles collections, Candles for Men or a Candle for Women. Our candles are perfect to elevate Bedrooms, Living Rooms, Bathrooms, Hallways & Communal areas.
